# Grand Dust Global Ventures

> The World's Most Elite Financial Advisory — offering loans against property, real estate transactions, gold & silver operations, and diamond trade across India, Malaysia & USA. Founded by Guruprasad.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://granddustglobal.com/): Overview of all services, trust badges, global presence, and company statistics.
- [About Us](https://granddustglobal.com/about): Company story, founder Guruprasad, mission, vision, and core values.
- [Services](https://granddustglobal.com/services): Overview of all four service verticals.
- [Locations](https://granddustglobal.com/locations): Offices in Coimbatore, Mumbai, Kuala Lumpur, and USA.
- [Contact Us](https://granddustglobal.com/contact): Phone, email, WhatsApp, and contact form.

## Services

- [Finance & Mortgage Loans](https://granddustglobal.com/services/finance-mortgage): Loans against property up to 50% of market value with attractive interest rates.
- [Real Estate Transactions](https://granddustglobal.com/services/real-estate): Land buying and selling with verified properties and end-to-end support.
- [Gold & Silver Operations](https://granddustglobal.com/services/gold-silver): Custom jewelry, gold pledging, jewelry redemption, and gold buying at highest prices.
- [Diamond Trade](https://granddustglobal.com/services/diamond-trade): Buying and selling certified diamonds with transparent transactions.
